data.title: Tokenized social network ResearchHub completes $2 million financing, BoostVC participates
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Tokenized social network ResearchHub announced the completion of a new round of financing of US$2 million, with BoostVC participating. The new funds will further use its ResearchCoin (RSC) tokens to encourage scientists to publicly share academic content and build decentralized scientific collaboration and publishing tools to promote research collaboration, feedback and knowledge sharing among researchers.

data.title: Taining Court: USDT entrusted transactions, management and other issues are not currently regulated or protected by law in my country
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Taining Court concluded a contract dispute involving "USDT coin" as a financial management object. In 2021, Jiang and Lin met through others and established a WeChat group to trade "USDT coin". From 2021 to 2022, Jiang transferred about 100,000 yuan to Lin through WeChat and bank transfers, and Lin bought about 76,000 U coins for him. Jiang also designated Lin to buy 81,000 U coins. Jiang transferred his U coins to the platform in multiple times according to Lin's instructions, and Lin operated the experience, but all the funds were exhausted by Lin's operation, so he filed a lawsuit with the court.
The court held that the plaintiff Jiang claimed that the dispute between the two parties was a guarantee contract dispute, and the two parties established a private entrusted financial management contract relationship regarding the virtual currency, namely the U coin investment project. The issues of entrusted trading and management of virtual currency, namely U coins, between Jiang and Lin are not currently regulated and protected by law in my country, and the consequences of their actions should be borne by Jiang himself. Therefore, the court ruled to dismiss Jiang’s lawsuit.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin joins the resistance against the UK government’s push for Apple user data
data.description:
Vitalik urged security agencies like the NSA and the GCHQ to work towards enhancing citizens' digital security.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/vitalik-buterin-against-uk-apple-user-data/

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-02-23)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.18T, down by -2.39% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $96,144 and $96,980 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $96,313, down by -0.05%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include TST, GLM, and TRU, up by 54%, 27%, and 20%, respectively.

data.title: Bybit transfers 34,743 ETH to its hot wallet, worth $97.6 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Arkham monitoring data, about 1 minute ago, 34,743 ETH were transferred from the Bybit Deposit address to the Bybit hot wallet address, worth 97.6 million US dollars.

data.title: Bybit: Deposits and withdrawals have fully returned to normal levels
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bybit released an update on the X platform saying that deposits and withdrawals on Bybit have fully returned to normal levels, and the on-chain data has confirmed this.

data.title: CryptoQuant Research Director: Bybit's ETH reserves have recovered to about 160,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Julio Moreno, head of research at CryptoQuant, published a post on the X platform disclosing data that Bybit's ETH reserves have recovered to about 160,000.

data.title: Binance Futures will update leverage and margin tiers for IPUSDT, BANUSDT, and OMUSDT U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will update the leverage and margin tiers of IPUSDT, BANUSDT and OMUSDT U-margin perpetual contracts at 15:30 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on February 23, 2025. Due to the update of leverage and margin tiers, the contract grid strategy may be affected and terminated. Users are advised to make corresponding adjustments in time before the change.

data.title: Bybit may have purchased a total of 106,498 ETH in the past day or so
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the address (0x2E4...b77) that may be Bybit or its affiliates received another 34,743 ETH (US$97.75 million) from Wintermute 20 minutes ago. They are likely to have purchased a total of 106,498 ETH (US$294.93 million) in the past day or so: through Galaxy Digital, FalconX, and Wintermute. This address first received ETH after receiving 100 million USDT from Bybit's cold wallet and transferring it to FalconX and Galaxy Digital. Galaxy Digital, FalconX, and Wintermute all transferred ETH from various CEXs to the 0x2E4...b77 address, and they should have all bought it on the secondary market.

data.title: Today, the Fear and Greed Index rebounded slightly to 50, and the level is still neutral.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Alternative data, today's Fear and Greed Index rose slightly compared to yesterday, and has now risen to 50 (yesterday's 49), and the level is still neutral.
Note: The threshold of the Fear Index is 0-100, including indicators: volatility (25%) + market trading volume (25%) + social media heat (15%) + market research (15%) + Bitcoin's proportion in the entire market (10%) + Google hot word analysis (10%).
